summary: Iteration 184 Feature Testing Complete - All key features verified. Backend: 17/19 tests passed (2 skipped unrelated regression tests). Frontend: All 5 feature areas verified.

stats_overview_endpoint.description: GET /api/admin/members/stats/overview returns active_members, team_leaders, suspended, in_danger

suspended_member_isolation.description: Default member list excludes suspended users, status=suspended filter shows only suspended

habits_day_of_week.description: Admin can create habits with day_of_week, GET /api/habits/ filters by today's day

habits_requires_screenshot.description: Habits with requires_screenshot=true return 400 when completed without screenshot

forum_tabs.description: Forum page shows Open/Solved/All tabs with proper styling

admin_stat_cards.description: Admin Members page shows 4 stat cards (Active, Team Leaders, Suspended, In Danger)

habit_manager_form.description: Habit Manager shows day_of_week selector and requires_screenshot toggle

referral_tree_visual.description: Referral tree views have off-white background (#f5f5f0) confirmed in code

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed habits created and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 184 tests complete. All new features working: stats overview endpoint, suspended member isolation, forum tabs, habits with day_of_week and requires_screenshot. Monday Story Day habit exists for Monday-only testing.
